---
title: "Functions"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)

```

```{r data import}
template <- read_excel("./Manuscript/Sample sheet layout.xlsx")
```


```{r column name recoder}

colname_recode <- function(df, verbose = T) {
  
  # ---- Check dependency ----
  if (!requireNamespace("janitor", quietly = TRUE)) {
    stop("Package 'janitor' is required. Install with install.packages('janitor')")
  }
  
  # ---- Step 1: clean names ----
  df <- janitor::clean_names(df)
  current <- names(df)
  
  # ---- Load clean dictionary ----
  dict <- list(
    Samp_ID        = c("sample_id", "sampleid", "sampid"),
    `18s_Fastq_ID` = c("x18s_fastq_id", "fastq_18s", "18s_id"),
    `18s_run`      = c("run_18s", "18s_run"),
    `16s_Fastq_ID` = c("16s_fastq", "fastq_16s", "16s_id"),
    `16s_run`      = c("run_16s"),
    Other_Fastq_ID = c("other_fastq", "alt_fastq"),
    Other_seq_info = c("other_seq", "seq_info"),
    Project        = c("proj"),
    Source_Type    = c("source", "src_type"),
    Trip_ID        = c("tripid"),
    Trip           = c("trip_name"),
    Date           = c("collection_date", "sample_date"),
    Site           = c("location"),
    Tributary      = c("trib"),
    RM             = c("river_mile"),
    Time           = c("collection_time"),
    Species        = c("species_name"),
    TL_mm          = c("total_length", "tl"),
    FL_mm          = c("fork_length", "fl"),
    Weight_g       = c("weight", "wt"),
    Pit.Tag        = c("pit_tag", "tag"),
    Notes          = c("comments")
  )
  dict_clean <- lapply(dict, janitor::make_clean_names)
  
  # ---- Initialize ----
  new_names <- rep(NA_character_, length(current))
  
  # ---- Matching (dictionary only) ----
  for (i in seq_along(current)) {
    cn <- current[i]
    
    for (std in names(dict_clean)) {
      if (cn %in% dict_clean[[std]]) {
        new_names[i] <- std
        break
      }
    }
  }
  
  # ---- Identify unmatched ----
  unmatched <- current[is.na(new_names)]
  
  if (length(unmatched) > 0) {
    message("Unmatched columns: ", paste(unmatched, collapse = ", "))
  }
  
  # ---- Apply names (keep original if unmatched) ----
  final_names <- ifelse(is.na(new_names), current, new_names)
  names(df) <- final_names
  
  # ---- Return useful output ----
  return(list(
    data = df,
    mapping = data.frame(
      original_clean = current,
      new_name = final_names,
      matched = !is.na(new_names)
    ),
    unmatched = unmatched
  ))
}

colname_recode(test)
  
```
  
  
```{r test}
#supporting materials
test <- read_excel("Manuscript/test colnames.xlsx")
df <- test


##function test
  # ---- Check dependency ----
  if (!requireNamespace("janitor", quietly = TRUE)) {
    stop("Package 'janitor' is required. Install with install.packages('janitor')")
  }
  
  # ---- Step 1: clean names ----
  df <- janitor::clean_names(df)
  current <- names(df)
  
  # ---- Load clean dictionary ----
  dict <- list(
    Samp_ID        = c("sample_id", "sampleid", "sampid"),
    `18s_Fastq_ID` = c("x18s_fastq_id", "fastq_18s", "18s_id"),
    `18s_run`      = c("run_18s", "18s_run"),
    `16s_Fastq_ID` = c("16s_fastq", "fastq_16s", "16s_id"),
    `16s_run`      = c("run_16s"),
    Other_Fastq_ID = c("other_fastq", "alt_fastq"),
    Other_seq_info = c("other_seq", "seq_info"),
    Project        = c("proj"),
    Source_Type    = c("source", "src_type"),
    Trip_ID        = c("tripid"),
    Trip           = c("trip_name"),
    Date           = c("collection_date", "sample_date"),
    Site           = c("location"),
    Tributary      = c("trib"),
    RM             = c("river_mile"),
    Time           = c("collection_time"),
    Species        = c("species_name"),
    TL_mm          = c("total_length", "tl"),
    FL_mm          = c("fork_length", "fl"),
    Weight_g       = c("weight", "wt"),
    Pit.Tag        = c("pit_tag", "tag"),
    Notes          = c("comments")
  )
  dict_clean <- lapply(dict, janitor::make_clean_names)
  
  # ---- Initialize ----
  new_names <- rep(NA_character_, length(current))
  
  # ---- Matching (dictionary only) ----
  for (i in seq_along(current)) {
    cn <- current[i]
    
    for (std in names(dict_clean)) {
      if (cn %in% dict_clean[[std]]) {
        new_names[i] <- std
        break
      }
    }
  }
  
  # ---- Identify unmatched ----
  unmatched <- current[is.na(new_names)]
  
  if (length(unmatched) > 0) {
    message("Unmatched columns: ", paste(unmatched, collapse = ", "))
  }
  
  # ---- Apply names (keep original if unmatched) ----
  final_names <- ifelse(is.na(new_names), current, new_names)
  names(df) <- final_names
  
  # ---- Return useful output ----
  return(list(
    data = df,
    mapping = data.frame(
      original_clean = current,
      standardized = final_names,
      matched = !is.na(new_names)
    ),
    unmatched = unmatched
  ))
}
    
```
